description: AI Agent API Discovery - Points to the OpenAPI specification for NutritionColours clinical data.
rateLimit: Be respectful. No explicit rate limit but please cache responses.

endpoints.description: Clinical conditions with mechanisms, biomarkers, and protocols
Therapeutic herbs with dosages, mechanisms, and citations
Therapeutic recipes with ingredients and nutritional analysis
PubMed-style evidence summaries with evidence levels
Structured clinical comparisons between herbs and protocols
Clinical confidence scores with evidence levels and review dates
Voice search conversation trees for natural Q&A
Full clinical knowledge graph as JSON-LD
